goal: polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(q, x, n) * (x - a)
polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_bound(p, a, n, q) = forall(x0: R) { polynomial_eval_bound(p, x0, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(q, x0, n) * (x0 - a) }

p.c: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: Nat, x2: Polynomial[T0], x3: T0) { forall(x4: T0) { polynomial_eval_bound[T0](x0, x4, x1) = polynomial_eval_bound[T0](x2, x4, x1) * (x4 - x3) } = polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_bound[T0](x0, x3, x1, x2) }[R](p, n, q, a)
exists(k0: R) { polynomial_eval_bound(p, k0, n) != polynomial_eval_bound(q, k0, n) * (k0 - a) }
let w0: R satisfy { polynomial_eval_bound(q, w0, n) * (w0 - a) != polynomial_eval_bound(p, w0, n) }
function(x0: R) { polynomial_eval_bound(q, x0, n) * (x0 - a) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, x0, n) }(w0)

goal: exists(k0: Polynomial[R]) { k0 = q and polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_bound(p, a, n, k0) }

p.c: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Nat) { exists(k0: Polynomial[T0]) { polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2, k0) } = polynomial_divisible_by_x_minus_a_polynomial_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](p, a, n)
not exists(k0: Polynomial[R]) { polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_bound(p, a, n, k0) } or polynomial_divisible_by_x_minus_a_polynomial_bound(p, a, n)
(forall(x0: Polynomial[R]) { not polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_bound(p, a, n, x0) or polynomial_divisible_by_x_minus_a_polynomial_bound(p, a, n) })
(forall(x0: Polynomial[R]) { not polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_bound(p, a, n, x0) })
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { not x0(x1) or exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) } }[Polynomial[R]](polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_bound(p, a, n), q)

goal: polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, a, n) + (x - a) * polynomial_quotient_eval_bound(p, a, x, n)
R.0 + (x - a) * polynomial_quotient_eval_bound(p, a, x, n) = (x - a) * polynomial_quotient_eval_bound(p, a, x, n)

p.c: function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[R]((x - a) * polynomial_quotient_eval_bound(p, a, x, n))

goal: (x - a) * polynomial_quotient_eval_bound(p, a, x, n) = polynomial_quotient_eval_bound(p, a, x, n) * (x - a)

p.c: function[T0: lib(comm_semigroup).CommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }[R](polynomial_quotient_eval_bound(p, a, x, n), x - a)

goal: polynomial_quotient_eval_bound(p, a, x, n) = coeff_eval(polynomial_quotient_coeff(p, a, n), x, n)

p.c: function[T0: Semiring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Nat, x3: T0) { coeff_eval[T0](polynomial_quotient_coeff[T0](x0, x1, x2), x3, x2) = polynomial_quotient_eval_bound[T0](x0, x1, x3, x2) }[R](p, a, n, x)

goal: coeff_mul_x_minus_a(polynomial_quotient_coeff(p, a, n), a, x, n) = coeff_eval(polynomial_quotient_coeff(p, a, n), x, n) * (x - a)

p.c: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Nat -> T0, x1: T0, x2: Nat, x3: T0) { coeff_eval[T0](x0, x1, x2) * (x1 - x3) = coeff_mul_x_minus_a[T0](x0, x3, x1, x2) }[R](polynomial_quotient_coeff(p, a, n), x, n, a)

goal: coeff_mul_x_minus_a(polynomial_quotient_coeff(p, a, n), a, x, n) = polynomial_quotient_eval_bound(p, a, x, n) * (x - a)
polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, n) = coeff_mul_x_minus_a(polynomial_quotient_coeff(p, a, n), a, x, n)
polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, n) = coeff_mul_x_minus_a(q, a, x, n)

p.c: function(x0: R) { coeff_mul_x_minus_a(polynomial_quotient_coeff(p, a, n), a, x0, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, x0, n) }(x)

goal: polynomial_x_minus_a_witness_bound(p, a, n, q) = forall(x0: R) { polynomial_eval_bound(p, x0, n) = coeff_mul_x_minus_a(q, a, x0, n) }

p.c: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: Nat, x2: Nat -> T0, x3: T0) { forall(x4: T0) { polynomial_eval_bound[T0](x0, x4, x1) = coeff_mul_x_minus_a[T0](x2, x3, x4, x1) } = polynomial_x_minus_a_witness_bound[T0](x0, x3, x1, x2) }[R](p, n, q, a)

let w0: R satisfy { coeff_mul_x_minus_a(q, a, w0, n) != polynomial_eval_bound(p, w0, n) }
function(x0: R) { coeff_mul_x_minus_a(q, a, x0, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, x0, n) }(w0)

goal: exists(k0: Nat -> R) { k0 = q and polynomial_x_minus_a_witness_bound(p, a, n, k0) }

p.c: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat -> T0) { polynomial_x_minus_a_witness_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2, k0) } = polynomial_divisible_by_x_minus_a_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](p, a, n)
not exists(k0: Nat -> R) { polynomial_x_minus_a_witness_bound(p, a, n, k0) } or polynomial_divisible_by_x_minus_a_bound(p, a, n)

function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { not x0(x1) or exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) } }[Nat -> R](polynomial_x_minus_a_witness_bound(p, a, n), q)

goal: exists(k0: Nat -> R) { polynomial_x_minus_a_witness_bound(p, a, n, k0) }

p.c: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat -> T0) { polynomial_x_minus_a_witness_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2, k0) } = polynomial_divisible_by_x_minus_a_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](p, a, n)

goal: polynomial_x_minus_a_witness_bound(p, a, n, q) = forall(x0: R) { polynomial_eval_bound(p, x0, n) = coeff_mul_x_minus_a(q, a, x0, n) }

p.c: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: Nat, x2: Nat -> T0, x3: T0) { forall(x4: T0) { polynomial_eval_bound[T0](x0, x4, x1) = coeff_mul_x_minus_a[T0](x2, x3, x4, x1) } = polynomial_x_minus_a_witness_bound[T0](x0, x3, x1, x2) }[R](p, n, q, a)

goal: polynomial_eval_bound(p, a, n) = coeff_mul_x_minus_a(q, a, a, n)

p.c: function(x0: R) { coeff_mul_x_minus_a(q, a, x0, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, x0, n) }(a)

goal: coeff_mul_x_minus_a(q, a, a, n) = coeff_eval(q, a, n) * (a - a)

p.c: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Nat -> T0, x1: T0, x2: Nat, x3: T0) { coeff_eval[T0](x0, x1, x2) * (x1 - x3) = coeff_mul_x_minus_a[T0](x0, x3, x1, x2) }[R](q, a, n, a)

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.0 = T0.0 }[R](coeff_eval(q, a, n))

function[T0: CommRing](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Nat) { exists(k0: Polynomial[T0]) { polynomial_x_minus_a_polynomial_witness_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2, k0) } = polynomial_divisible_by_x_minus_a_polynomial_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](p, a, n)

goal: polynomial_eval_bound(p, a, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(q, a, n) * (a - a)

p.c: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[R](a, a)
